coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:12 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 85-100 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/12. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 1:00 at 105-105% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit fully. 12 intervals ahead.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 1:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 1:00 at 105-105%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 108%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/12. 108% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/12. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/3. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/12. 108% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 10 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 3 of 12.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/12. You're building something real here. 9 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/12. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25% complete. Rep 3/12. Fatigue is real — hold form. 112%, 90-95 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/12. 10 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/12. Duration: 1:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/12. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 1/3. 115%, 90-95 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 42% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 105% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 1min at 108%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 42% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 42% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. 105% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 45% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 108% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 112% for 1min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 45% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 45% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. 108% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 47% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 112% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 1min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 47% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 47% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. 112% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 4:00. Then 12min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 4:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 3 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 64% through session. Rep 9/12. You've done 8min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23 minutes of work done. 11 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 64% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 3 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% into session. 105% at 85-90 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 10/12. 24 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 10: 108% FTP. You're 24 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 2 reps left. 10 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 24 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24 minutes in. 108% FTP, 85-90 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1 reps left. 9 minutes total. Your competition quit 10 minutes ago.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 70% complete. 112% for 1:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 85-90 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 11/12. You're building something real here. 1 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 11/12. 112% FTP × 1:00. Seated. 1 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 115%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 1:00 at 115%. Then 8min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This one is harder than the last. That's exactly how it should be. You're adapting. You're improving.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 1:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 115% × 1:00. Then 8min cooldown. Leave nothing.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% done. 0 intervals left. 4 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 31 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
